subcodes.title: Words spoken at Goodall home in Oakland, 1912-10-16
subcodes.first_line: On the way here we were saying that it never occurred to us that we would come to California and meet with the friends in this manner
subcodes.first_line_orig: در راه این صحبت را میداشتیم که هیچ بخاطر نمیآمد که بکلیفورنیا بیائیم و این طور با احباء ملاقات کنیم
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity; oneness of humanity
